programmes.show_description: Action thriller with Henry Cavill. A police officer and a vigilante are caught up in a dangerous scheme involving a troubled, recently-arrested man who is linked to years of female abductions. (2018)
Spy thriller with Michael Caine. An MI6 defector has his appearance altered by the KGB and is sent back to steal documents - but decides to play both sides against each other for his own gain. (1983)
London TV returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Sci-fi action that will blow you away! When Washington DC suffers a series of freak weather anomalies two estranged brothers suspect their climatologist father may be involved. (2011)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Dr Wells continues to discuss Steve's road to recovery, combined with the trauma of becoming part-man, part-machine. Steve performs his first bionic feat. S1, Ep2
While investigating the black market in nuclear weapons, Steve tries to retrieve secret papers from a yacht - but finds himself in grave danger instead. S1, Ep3
After narrowly escaping with his life, Steve must infiltrate a huge terrorist complex to search for the stolen missiles. S1, Ep4
An international syndicate kidnaps the President's advisor who is en route to meet with the Chinese, and demands one billion in gold bullion in exchange. S1, Ep5
The President authorises payment of the ransom for Henry, but when the gold is stolen, Steve must recover the bullion and - more importantly - rescue Henry. S1, Ep6
Crime drama with Matthew McConaughey. A prospector desperate for a lucky break teams up with a geologist and sets off on a risky expedition to find gold in a remote Indonesian jungle. (2016)
Ecological terror. When the waters surrounding a remote island are contaminated by chemical dumping, anyone eating fish from the area are transformed into deformed murderous maniacs. (1972)
Action adventure. British inspector Harry Sanders investigates diamond and gold fraud in Africa, uncovering a plot involving smugglers raiding a sunken ship. (1964)
After being chased on horseback by a mysterious and terrifying figure dressed in black hours before her engagement, a woman faces the biggest decision of her life. S5, Ep21
As a spy is about to be hanged, the rope breaks and he falls to the water below. Finally free, he races home - and learns the terrible truth of his future. S5, Ep22
Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh. A team of explorers looking for King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. (1995)
Western with Sam Worthington. An outlaw learns of a prophecy that claims one of his estranged children will kill him, and decides to hunt down each of them and end the curse. (2021)
Crime thriller with Sylvester Stallone. After suffering a brain injury, the only surviving thief from a bank heist is given an experimental drug to rebuild his memory and help crack the case. (2018)
Sci-fi sequel with Patrick Bergin. Computerised megalomaniac Jobe returns in a bid to take over the world from cyberspace, and only a youngster and a scientist stand in his way. (1995)
London TV returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Sci-fi adventure with Mario Van Peebles. When a mysterious fleet of otherworldly ships wage war on planet Earth, the crew of the warship USS Iowa prepare to defend the world. (2012)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
As violence erupts on a busy street, Romano gets caught in the crossfire and suffers a nasty head wound, while Hooker is accused of shooting an unarmed youngster. S2, Ep7
An ambitious detective tries to frame one of Hooker's friends in connection with a gang of jewel thieves. S2, Ep8
A hearing-impaired 14-year-old gang member is conned into taking the rap for a murder committed by a big-time drug dealer. S2, Ep9
Romano and Hooker try to avert a war between independent hauliers and a wholesaler who has been sabotaging their trucks. S2, Ep10
Hooker is horrified to discover drug abuse is rife at a local high school after a schoolgirl hallucinating on angel dust tries to fly from atop the building. S2, Ep11
Western with Barry Sullivan. A wealthy and crooked rancher cuts off a town's water supply in a bid to blackmail the locals, leaving a tough-talking marshal to sort things out. (1968)
Western with Gary Cooper. An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands to rescue settlers who have been captured by a group of marauding Seminole rebels. (1951)
Western adventure with country singer Kenny Rogers. Brady Hawkes, a tough gambler in the old West, finds himself in serious danger after answering a plea for help. (1980)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
An inquisitive newspaper columnist interviews glamourous movie star Pamela Morris at her lavish mansion, hoping to find the key to her apparent immortality. S5, Ep23
An irritable taxi driver insults his TV repairman, and is later horrified to see secrets from his private life - and their horrific consequences - revealed on his TV set. S5, Ep24
Crime thriller with Christian Slater. Notorious gangsters Bugsy Siegel and Lucky Luciano make a daring bid to overthrow the dons of Twenties New York. (1991)
Tense action thriller with John Cena. A New Orleans detective must complete a series of dangerous games to rescue his kidnapped girlfriend from a vengeful criminal mastermind. (2009)
